Source code for killMS.Other.ModColor

#!/usr/bin/env python
"""
killMS, a package for calibration in radio interferometry.
Copyright (C) 2013-2017  Cyril Tasse, l'Observatoire de Paris,
SKA South Africa, Rhodes University

modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License
as published by the Free Software Foundation; either version 2
of the License, or (at your option) any later version.

This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
GNU General Public License for more details.

You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software
Foundation, Inc., 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA  02110-1301, USA.
"""
from __future__ import absolute_import
from __future__ import division
from __future__ import print_function
# define volours
HEADER = '\033[95m'
OKBLUE = '\033[94m'
OKGREEN = '\033[92m'
WARNING = '\033[93m'
FAIL = '\033[91m'
ENDC = '\033[0m'
bold='\033[1m'
nobold='\033[0m'
Separator="================================%s=================================="
silent=0
    


[docs]
def Str(strin0,
        col:str="red",
        Bold:bool=True) -> str:
    '''
    Function to format strings for terminal log. Returns formatted string.
    
    :param strin0: Input value to format.
    :param col: string colour
    :param Bold: Description
    '''
    # if silent, do not format 
    if silent==1: return strin0
    # otherwise, format string
    strin=str(strin0)
    if col=="red":
        ss=FAIL
    if col=="green":
        ss=OKGREEN
    elif col=="yellow":
        ss=WARNING
    elif col=="blue":
        ss=OKBLUE
    elif col=="green":
        ss=OKGREEN
    elif col=="white":
        ss=""
    ss="%s%s%s"%(ss,strin,ENDC)
    if Bold: ss="%s%s%s"%(bold,ss,nobold)
    return ss





[docs]
def Sep(strin=None,
        D:int=1) -> str:
    # TODO: change D to bool, and figure out why its called D...
    '''
    Returns a separator string, optionally annotated by the provided strin descriptor.
    
    :param strin: Input value to be formatted
    :param D: add input string as a Descriptor (?) for the separator
    '''
    if D!=1:
        return Str(Separator%("="*len(strin)))
    else:
        return Str(Separator%(strin))





[docs]
def Title(strin,
          Big:bool=False) -> None:
    '''
    Prints the Title for a given section. If Big is true, adds additional separator
    lines at the top and bottom of the Title.
    
    :param strin: Title descriptor string.
    :param Big: Option to add extra sepatarators at top and bottom.
    '''
    print()
    print()
    if Big: print(Sep(strin,D=0))
    print(Sep(strin))
    if Big: print(Sep(strin,D=0))
    print()





[docs]
def disable() -> None:
    '''
    Function to set all logger environment variables to be empty: disables colourful logs.
    '''
    HEADER = ''
    OKBLUE = ''
    OKGREEN = ''
    WARNING = ''
    FAIL = ''
    ENDC = ''
